en: Take a big wet bite out of my ass is what. Poor Barry.
Terrible fuckin' luck, huh? Cryin' shame.
Some people really got it awful. Andy, you nuts?
Keep your eyes on your mop, man. Andy. Well, all right, you're gonna pay some taxes, but you'll still end up with what?
Oh yeah, yeah, maybe enough to buy a new car, and then what?
ko: 아, 맞아. 새 차를 살 만큼은 될지도 모르지, 그럼 어쩌고?

en: I gotta pay tax on the car. Repair, maintenance.
ko: 차에 세금 내야 하고, 수리, 유지비도 있어.

en: Goddamn kids pestering you to take them for a ride all the time?
Then at the end of the year, you figure the tax wrong, you gotta pay them out of your own pocket.
I tell you, Uncle Sam, he puts his hand in your shirt and squeezes your tit till it's purple.
He's the truth. Andy. Rich kid.
Get yourself killed. Keep talking, no. Some brother.
Mr. Hadley, do you trust your wife?
Oh, that's funny. You're gonna look funnier sucking my dick with no teeth.
